name: Charismatic Kashmir Paradise
overview: Explore the paradise on earth — Srinagar, Gulmarg, Pahalgam and Sonmarg. Experience houseboat stays, shikara rides, and stunning Himalayan landscapes.
highlights: Shikara ride on Dal Lake at sunset
Stay in a traditional Kashmiri houseboat

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar — Houseboat
itinerary.desc: Arrive Srinagar Airport. Transfer to houseboat on Dal Lake. Evening Shikara ride watching sunset. Overnight houseboat.

itinerary.title: Srinagar — Mughal Gardens
itinerary.desc: Visit Nishat Bagh, Shalimar Bagh, Chashme Shahi. Visit Shankaracharya Temple. Evening shopping at Lal Chowk.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
itinerary.desc: Drive to Gulmarg (56 km). Gondola ride Phase 1 with Himalayan views. Horse riding, ATV at extra cost. Return Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Pahalgam
itinerary.desc: Drive to Pahalgam (95 km). Visit Betaab Valley, Aru Valley, Chandanwari. Enjoy serene pine forests and Lidder River.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
itinerary.desc: Drive back via Pampore Saffron fields. Visit handicraft market. Shop for Pashmina shawls, dry fruits. Last Shikara ride.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast. Transfer to Srinagar Airport. Tour ends with beautiful memories.

name: Magical Manali & Shimla
overview: Snow-capped mountains, adventure activities, and colonial charm of Himachal Pradesh.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Shimla
itinerary.desc: Arrive Chandigarh. Drive to Shimla (5 hrs). Evening Mall Road walk and Christ Church.

itinerary.title: Shimla — Kufri
itinerary.desc: Visit Kufri for snow activities, Green Valley, Indian Institute of Advanced Study. Evening Mall Road shopping.

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali
itinerary.desc: Drive Shimla to Manali (7-8 hrs) through Kullu Valley. Stop for river rafting (optional). Arrive and check in.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley & Atal Tunnel
itinerary.desc: Visit Solang Valley — zorbing, paragliding, zip-line (extra cost). Visit Atal Tunnel.

itinerary.title: Manali Local Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Hadimba Temple, Manu Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, Tibetan Monastery, Club House. Evening Old Manali cafes.

itinerary.title: Naggar Castle & Kullu
itinerary.desc: Visit Naggar Castle, Roerich Art Gallery, Jana Waterfall, Kullu Shawl Factory.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Chandigarh Airport/Station. Tour ends.

name: Goa Beach Paradise
overview: Sun, sand and stunning beaches! North & South Goa with water sports, nightlife, churches, and spice plantations.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Goa
itinerary.desc: Arrive Goa Airport. Transfer to hotel. Evening explore Calangute/Baga Beach sunset and beach shacks.

itinerary.title: North Goa Tour
itinerary.desc: Fort Aguada, Sinquerim Beach, Baga water sports (Parasailing, Jet Ski, Banana Ride), Anjuna Beach, Vagator Beach.

itinerary.title: South Goa Tour
itinerary.desc: Basilica of Bom Jesus, Se Cathedral, Dona Paula, Miramar Beach, Colva Beach. Optional Spice Plantation.

itinerary.title: Dudhsagar & Cruise
itinerary.desc: Morning Dudhsagar Waterfall (seasonal, extra cost). Evening Mandovi River Sunset Cruise with live music.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast. Transfer to Goa Airport. Tour ends.

name: Kerala Backwaters & Hills
overview: God's Own Country — backwaters on a houseboat, tea gardens of Munnar, wildlife of Thekkady.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Cochin
itinerary.desc: Arrive Cochin Airport. Fort Kochi, Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church. Evening Kathakali show.

itinerary.title: Cochin to Munnar
itinerary.desc: Drive to Munnar (4 hrs). Visit Cheeyappara & Valara Waterfalls en route. Evening in misty hills.

itinerary.title: Munnar Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Eravikulam National Park, Tea Museum, Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, Top Station panoramic views.

itinerary.title: Munnar to Thekkady
itinerary.desc: Drive to Thekkady (4 hrs). Spice plantation visit. Periyar Lake boating for wildlife. Cultural show.

itinerary.title: Thekkady to Alleppey Houseboat
itinerary.desc: Drive to Alleppey (4 hrs). Board premium houseboat. Overnight backwater cruise with Kerala cuisine.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Disembark. Drive to Cochin Airport (1.5 hrs). Tour ends.

name: Royal Rajasthan Grand Tour
overview: Royal heritage of Rajasthan — Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur, Jaisalmer. Forts, palaces, desert safaris.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Jaipur
itinerary.desc: Arrive Jaipur. Evening Birla Mandir and Johari Bazaar markets.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, Nahargarh Fort sunset.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
itinerary.desc: Drive to Jodhpur (5 hrs). Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, explore blue city lanes.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
itinerary.desc: Drive to Jaisalmer (5 hrs). Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli, Salim Singh Ki Haveli.

itinerary.title: Desert Safari
itinerary.desc: Gadisar Lake, Bada Bagh. Afternoon Sam Sand Dunes camel safari, cultural show, dinner under stars.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
itinerary.desc: Drive to Udaipur (8 hrs) via Ranakpur Jain Temple. Check in.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: City Palace, Saheliyon Ki Bari, Jagdish Temple, Lake Pichola boat ride, Fateh Sagar Lake.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Udaipur Airport. Tour ends.

name: Andaman Island Escape
overview: Crystal clear waters, pristine beaches and coral reefs — Port Blair, Havelock & Neil Island.

itinerary.title: Arrival Port Blair
itinerary.desc: Arrive Port Blair. Cellular Jail, Light & Sound show. Corbyn's Cove Beach.

itinerary.title: Port Blair to Havelock
itinerary.desc: Ferry to Havelock. Visit Radhanagar Beach — Asia's best beach.

itinerary.title: Havelock Adventures
itinerary.desc: Elephant Beach snorkeling & water sports. Optional scuba. Afternoon Kalapathar Beach sunset.

itinerary.title: Havelock to Neil
itinerary.desc: Ferry to Neil Island. Laxmanpur Beach, Natural Bridge, Bharatpur Beach glass bottom boat.

itinerary.title: Neil to Port Blair
itinerary.desc: Ferry back. Samudrika Naval Museum, Chatham Saw Mill. Shopping.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Port Blair Airport.

name: Nainital & Mussoorie Hills
overview: Queen of Hills Mussoorie and Lake City Nainital — perfect family getaway.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Nainital
itinerary.desc: Pickup from Delhi. Drive to Nainital (7 hrs). Evening Mall Road walk and Naini Lake boating.

itinerary.title: Nainital Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Snow View Point cable car, Cave Garden, Tiffin Top. Afternoon Bhimtal and Sattal.

itinerary.title: Nainital to Mussoorie
itinerary.desc: Drive to Mussoorie (7 hrs). Evening Mall Road stroll, Company Garden.

itinerary.title: Mussoorie Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Kempty Falls, Mussoorie Lake, Gun Hill cable car, Lal Tibba. Afternoon Dhanaulti.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Delhi (6 hrs). Drop at airport/station.

name: Haridwar & Rishikesh Spiritual
overview: Holy Ganga banks — Ganga Aarti, adventure sports, yoga capital of the world.
highlights: Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri

itinerary.title: Arrival Haridwar
itinerary.desc: Arrive Haridwar. Mansa Devi Temple ropeway, Chandi Devi. Evening Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri.

itinerary.title: Haridwar to Rishikesh
itinerary.desc: Drive to Rishikesh. Ram Jhula, Laxman Jhula, Triveni Ghat, Parmarth Niketan. Evening Aarti.

itinerary.title: Adventure & Yoga
itinerary.desc: Morning river rafting (16 km). Beatles Ashram. Optional bungee/zipline.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Dehradun Airport/Haridwar Station.

name: Ladakh — Land of Passes
overview: Ultimate adventure — highest motorable passes, Pangong Lake camping, raw beauty of Ladakh.

itinerary.title: Arrival Leh — Acclimatize
itinerary.desc: Arrive Leh. Rest and acclimatize. Light walk — Leh Market, Shanti Stupa.

itinerary.title: Leh Local Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Hall of Fame, Magnetic Hill, Sangam, Pathar Sahib Gurudwara, Spituk Monastery.

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra via Khardung La
itinerary.desc: Drive over Khardung La (17,982 ft). Diskit Monastery, Hunder Sand Dunes double hump camel ride.

itinerary.title: Nubra to Pangong Lake
itinerary.desc: Drive to Pangong via Shyok route. Magical color-changing lake. Camping beside the lake.

itinerary.title: Pangong to Leh via Chang La
itinerary.desc: Morning photography. Drive back via Chang La. Visit Hemis & Thiksey Monasteries.

itinerary.title: Leh Free Day
itinerary.desc: Rest or optional activities — ATV, monasteries, Stok Palace Museum. Farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Leh Airport.

name: Meghalaya — Scotland of East
overview: Living root bridges, crystal clear rivers, stunning waterfalls, wettest place on earth.

itinerary.title: Guwahati to Shillong
itinerary.desc: Arrive Guwahati. Drive to Shillong (3 hrs). Visit Umiam Lake. Evening Police Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Shillong Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, Don Bosco Museum, Ward's Lake, Lady Hydari Park.

itinerary.title: Shillong to Cherrapunji
itinerary.desc: Visit Nohkalikai Falls, Seven Sisters Falls, Mawsmai Cave, Eco Park.

itinerary.title: Living Root Bridge
itinerary.desc: Trek to Double Decker Living Root Bridge Nongriat. Visit Rainbow Falls.

itinerary.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong
itinerary.desc: Crystal clear Umngot River boat ride. Mawlynnong — Asia's cleanest village. Return Shillong.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Guwahati Airport.

name: Varanasi Spiritual Experience
overview: Oldest living city — Ganga Aarti, ancient temples, sunrise boat ride on Ganges.

itinerary.title: Arrival Varanasi
itinerary.desc: Arrive. Transfer to hotel. Evening Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat.

itinerary.title: Temples & Ghats
itinerary.desc: Sunrise boat ride on Ganges. Kashi Vishwanath, Sankat Mochan, Tulsi Manas Temple. Walk through ancient galis.

itinerary.title: Sarnath Excursion
itinerary.desc: Sarnath — Buddha's first sermon site. Dhamek Stupa, Museum, Ashoka Pillar. BHU campus.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport.

name: Ooty & Kodaikanal Hills
overview: Nilgiri Hills and Kodaikanal's misty valleys — perfect South Indian hill station tour.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Ooty
itinerary.desc: Arrive Coimbatore. Drive to Ooty (3 hrs). Evening Ooty Lake boating.

itinerary.title: Ooty Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Botanical Garden, Rose Garden, Tea Factory, Doddabetta Peak. Optional Toy Train.

itinerary.title: Ooty to Kodaikanal
itinerary.desc: Drive to Kodaikanal (6 hrs). Evening Kodaikanal Lake and Coaker's Walk.

itinerary.title: Kodaikanal Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Pillar Rocks, Green Valley, Silver Cascade Falls, Bryant Park.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Coimbatore/Madurai Airport.

name: Coorg & Mysore Getaway
overview: Coffee plantations, misty hills, royal heritage — Scotland of India with majestic Mysore.

itinerary.title: Arrival Mysore
itinerary.desc: Arrive Mysore. Mysore Palace, Chamundi Hills. Evening Brindavan Gardens fountain show.

itinerary.title: Mysore to Coorg
itinerary.desc: Drive to Coorg (3 hrs). Abbey Falls, Raja's Seat sunset, Madikeri Fort.

itinerary.title: Coorg Exploration
itinerary.desc: Dubare Elephant Camp, Talakaveri, Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple), Coffee plantation.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Mysore/Bangalore Airport.

name: Sikkim Gangtok & Darjeeling
overview: Enchanting North East — Gangtok monasteries, Darjeeling tea gardens, Mt. Kanchenjunga views.

itinerary.title: Bagdogra to Gangtok
itinerary.desc: Arrive Bagdogra. Drive to Gangtok (5 hrs). Evening MG Marg stroll.

itinerary.title: Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir
itinerary.desc: Full day Tsomgo Lake, Baba Harbhajan Singh Temple, Nathula Pass (if permit).

itinerary.title: Gangtok Local
itinerary.desc: Rumtek Monastery, Do Drul Chorten, Namgyal Tibetology, Hanuman Tok, Tashi View Point.

itinerary.title: Gangtok to Darjeeling
itinerary.desc: Drive to Darjeeling (5 hrs). Evening Mall and Chowrasta.

itinerary.title: Tiger Hill & Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Early morning Tiger Hill sunrise over Kanchenjunga. Batasia Loop, Ghoom Monastery, Tea Garden, HMI, Zoo.

itinerary.title: Toy Train & Rock Garden
itinerary.desc: Darjeeling Himalayan Railway joy ride. Rock Garden, Ganga Maya Park, Japanese Peace Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Bagdogra Airport.

name: Jim Corbett Wildlife Safari
overview: Spot the Royal Bengal Tiger in India's oldest national park. Perfect weekend getaway from Delhi.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Jim Corbett
itinerary.desc: Pickup from Delhi (6 hrs). Check into resort. Evening nature walk and bonfire.

itinerary.title: Jungle Safari
itinerary.desc: Early morning jeep safari in Bijrani/Jhirna zone. Spot tigers, elephants, 580+ bird species. Afternoon Corbett Waterfall, Garjia Temple.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast. Drive back to Delhi.

name: Kashmir Honeymoon Special
overview: Romantic escape to Kashmir — candlelight dinners, houseboat stays, private Shikara rides.

itinerary.title: Welcome to Paradise
itinerary.desc: Flower garland welcome at airport. Transfer to luxury houseboat. Private Shikara sunset ride. Candlelight dinner.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg — Snow Romance
itinerary.desc: Drive to Gulmarg. Gondola ride together. Snow activities. Couple photo session.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam — Valley of Love
itinerary.desc: Betaab Valley (Bollywood filming spot), Aru Valley nature walk. Riverside picnic.

itinerary.title: Gardens & Shopping
itinerary.desc: Mughal Gardens, Pashmina shopping. Evening lakeside farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast and airport transfer.

name: Mesmerizing Dubai
overview: Glittering Dubai — Burj Khalifa, Desert Safari, Dhow Cruise, city tour and more.

itinerary.title: Arrival Dubai
itinerary.desc: Arrive Dubai Airport. Transfer to hotel. Evening Dhow Cruise dinner with live entertainment.

itinerary.title: Dubai City Tour
itinerary.desc: Jumeirah Mosque, Palm Jumeirah, Atlantis photo stop, Dubai Marina, Burj Al Arab, Gold Souk, Spice Souk.

itinerary.title: Desert Safari
itinerary.desc: Morning free for Dubai Mall. Afternoon Desert Safari — dune bashing, camel ride, sandboarding, BBQ dinner, belly dance.

itinerary.title: Burj Khalifa & Mall
itinerary.desc: Burj Khalifa 124th floor. Dubai Mall. Evening Dubai Fountain show.

itinerary.title: Free Day
itinerary.desc: Optional: Abu Dhabi tour, IMG Worlds, Dubai Parks, Global Village, shopping.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Dubai Airport.

name: Romantic Bali Honeymoon
overview: Ultimate romantic escape — water sports, temples, rice terraces, Nusa Penida island.

itinerary.title: Arrival Bali
itinerary.desc: Arrive Bali Airport. Flower garland welcome. Transfer to hotel/villa. Evening free.

itinerary.title: Water Sports & Uluwatu
itinerary.desc: Benoa Beach — Banana Boat, Parasailing, Jet Ski. Afternoon Uluwatu Temple sunset & Kecak Fire Dance.

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Island
itinerary.desc: Kelingking Beach, Angel's Billabong, Broken Beach, Crystal Bay snorkeling.

itinerary.title: Tanah Lot Sunset
itinerary.desc: Taman Ayun Temple (UNESCO). Tanah Lot Temple for iconic sunset.

itinerary.title: Kintamani & Rice Terrace
itinerary.desc: Mount Batur views, Coffee Plantation, Tegenungan Waterfall, Tegalalang Rice Terrace, Bali Jungle Swing.

itinerary.title: Denpasar City Tour
itinerary.desc: Kumbasari Art Market, Bajra Sandhi Monument, Ubud Art Market. Afternoon free for spa.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Bali Airport.

name: Maldives Paradise Escape
overview: Overwater villas, crystal lagoons, private beaches, world-class snorkeling in tropical paradise.

itinerary.title: Arrival Malé — Resort
itinerary.desc: Arrive Malé. Speedboat/seaplane to island resort. Check in villa. Evening sunset with welcome drink.

itinerary.title: Snorkeling & Water Sports
itinerary.desc: Guided snorkeling at house reef. Kayaking, paddleboarding, jet ski. Evening sunset dolphin cruise.

itinerary.title: Island Hopping & Spa
itinerary.desc: Island hopping + sandbank visit. Afternoon couples spa (luxury). Evening beach dining.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day
itinerary.desc: Free day — infinity pool, beach, fishing trip. Evening farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Speedboat/seaplane to Malé Airport.

name: Thailand Bangkok & Pattaya
overview: Vibrant culture, Bangkok temples, Pattaya beaches, Coral Island, exciting nightlife.

itinerary.title: Arrival Bangkok
itinerary.desc: Arrive Bangkok. Transfer to Pattaya (2 hrs). Evening Walking Street.

itinerary.title: Coral Island & Pattaya
itinerary.desc: Speedboat to Coral Island. Parasailing, snorkeling, sea walking. Evening Alcazar Cabaret Show.

itinerary.title: Nong Nooch & Viewpoints
itinerary.desc: Nong Nooch Tropical Garden, Big Buddha Hill, Gems Gallery.

itinerary.title: Pattaya to Bangkok
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Bangkok. Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Wat Arun. Evening Chao Phraya dinner cruise.

itinerary.title: Safari World / Floating Market
itinerary.desc: Full day Safari World or Damnoen Saduak Floating Market. Evening shopping MBK/Chatuchak.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Bangkok Airport.

name: Singapore & Malaysia Combo
overview: Two countries, one epic trip! Singapore's futuristic attractions and Malaysia's cultural heritage.

itinerary.title: Arrival Singapore
itinerary.desc: Arrive Changi. Transfer to hotel. Evening Gardens by the Bay light show, Marina Bay Sands area.

itinerary.title: Sentosa & City Tour
itinerary.desc: City tour — Merlion, Chinatown, Little India, Orchard. Afternoon Sentosa — S.E.A. Aquarium, Wings of Time.

itinerary.title: Universal Studios
itinerary.desc: Full day Universal Studios Singapore. Evening shopping Bugis Street.

itinerary.title: Singapore to KL
itinerary.desc: Transfer to KL. Petronas Towers photo stop, KL Tower, Central Market, Jalan Alor street food.

itinerary.title: Batu Caves & Genting
itinerary.desc: Batu Caves temple. Genting Highlands cable car, theme park. Return KL.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to KLIA Airport.

name: Europe — Switzerland & Paris
overview: Swiss Alps, Jungfraujoch, Interlaken, Lucerne, and romantic Paris with Eiffel Tower & Disneyland.

itinerary.title: Arrival Zurich
itinerary.desc: Arrive Zurich. Evening Lake Zurich walk, Bahnhofstrasse shopping.

itinerary.title: Lucerne & Mt. Titlis
itinerary.desc: Rhine Falls, Lucerne. Mt. Titlis revolving cable car & Ice Flyer. Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge.

itinerary.title: Lucerne to Interlaken
itinerary.desc: Lake Lucerne cruise. Drive to Interlaken. Harder Kulm panoramic views.

itinerary.title: Jungfraujoch
itinerary.desc: Cogwheel train to Top of Europe. Ice Palace, Sphinx Observatory. Return via Grindelwald.

itinerary.title: Interlaken to Paris
itinerary.desc: Transfer for train/flight to Paris. Arrive and check in. Evening Seine River Cruise.

itinerary.title: Paris City Tour
itinerary.desc: Eiffel Tower 2nd floor, Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, Louvre (outside), Notre-Dame.

itinerary.title: Paris Disneyland
itinerary.desc: Full day Disneyland Paris — rides, shows, parades.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Paris CDG Airport.

name: Vietnam Hanoi & Ha Long Bay
overview: Hanoi's ancient charm, Ha Long Bay limestone karsts, Ho Chi Minh City vibrant culture.

itinerary.title: Arrival Hanoi
itinerary.desc: Arrive Hanoi. Evening explore Old Quarter and Hoan Kiem Lake. Street food tour.

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Tour
itinerary.desc: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, Temple of Literature, Water Puppet Show.

itinerary.title: Ha Long Bay Cruise
itinerary.desc: Drive to Ha Long Bay (3.5 hrs). Board overnight cruise. Kayaking, swimming, sunset on deck.

itinerary.title: Ha Long — Hanoi — HCMC
itinerary.desc: Morning tai chi. Explore Sung Sot Cave. Return Hanoi. Evening flight to Ho Chi Minh City.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.desc: Cu Chi Tunnels, War Remnants Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, Ben Thanh Market. Saigon River dinner cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to HCMC Airport.

name: Magical Turkey Discovery
overview: Hot air balloons over Cappadocia, ancient ruins, Bosphorus cruise, cotton terraces of Pamukkale.

itinerary.title: Arrival Istanbul
itinerary.desc: Arrive Istanbul. Transfer. Evening Bosphorus dinner cruise.

itinerary.title: Istanbul City Tour
itinerary.desc: Hagia Sophia, Blue Mosque, Topkapi Palace, Grand Bazaar, Spice Market. Evening Taksim.

itinerary.title: Istanbul to Cappadocia
itinerary.desc: Fly to Cappadocia. Cave hotel check-in. Goreme Open Air Museum, Uchisar Castle. Love Valley sunset.

itinerary.title: Hot Air Balloon & Tour
itinerary.desc: Early morning balloon ride (optional/luxury included). Underground cities, Devrent Valley, Pasabag.

itinerary.title: Cappadocia to Pamukkale
itinerary.desc: Drive/fly to Pamukkale. Hierapolis ruins. Walk on white calcium terraces. Cleopatra's Pool.

itinerary.title: Pamukkale to Antalya
itinerary.desc: Drive to Antalya. Old Town Kaleici, Duden Waterfalls. Mediterranean beach.

itinerary.title: Antalya Leisure
itinerary.desc: Beach day, optional Perge/Aspendos ruins, shopping. Farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Antalya/Istanbul Airport.

name: Sri Lanka Cultural & Beach
overview: Ancient temples, tea plantations, wildlife safaris, pristine beaches all in one trip.

itinerary.title: Arrival — Sigiriya
itinerary.desc: Arrive Colombo. Drive to Sigiriya (4 hrs). Check in.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya & Dambulla
itinerary.desc: Climb Sigiriya Rock Fortress (UNESCO). Dambulla Cave Temple. Optional village tuk-tuk safari.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya to Kandy
itinerary.desc: Drive to Kandy (3 hrs). Spice garden en route. Temple of the Tooth. Kandy Cultural Dance show.

itinerary.title: Kandy to Ella
itinerary.desc: Scenic train ride Kandy to Ella (world's best train journeys). Nine Arches Bridge, Little Adam's Peak.

itinerary.title: Ella to Galle
itinerary.desc: Drive to Galle (4 hrs). Galle Fort (UNESCO), ramparts walk, Japanese Peace Pagoda. Beach time.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drive to Colombo Airport (2.5 hrs).

name: Nepal Kathmandu & Pokhara
overview: Land of Mt. Everest — Kathmandu temples, Pokhara's serene lakes, Himalayan panoramas.

itinerary.title: Arrival Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Arrive Tribhuvan Airport. Transfer to hotel. Evening Thamel market.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Pashupatinath, Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath (Monkey Temple), Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive/fly to Pokhara. Afternoon Phewa Lake boating, Tal Barahi Temple. Evening Lakeside area.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Early Sarangkot sunrise (Annapurna & Machapuchare). Devi's Fall, Gupteshwor Cave, World Peace Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Fly/drive to Kathmandu. Transfer to airport.

name: Greece Athens & Santorini
overview: Blue domes, stunning sunsets, ancient ruins — Athens' history and Santorini's romantic island vibes.

itinerary.title: Arrival Athens
itinerary.desc: Arrive Athens. Evening Plaka neighborhood and Monastiraki Square walk.

itinerary.title: Athens City Tour
itinerary.desc: Acropolis, Parthenon, Acropolis Museum, Temple of Zeus, Ancient Agora. Afternoon Ermou Street.

itinerary.title: Athens to Santorini
itinerary.desc: Morning flight/ferry. Caldera view hotel check-in. Explore Fira town. Evening Oia sunset.

itinerary.title: Caldera Cruise
itinerary.desc: Half-day catamaran cruise — hot springs, swim stops, Red Beach, BBQ lunch on board. Evening wine tasting.

itinerary.title: Beach & Leisure
itinerary.desc: Akrotiri archaeological site, Perissa Black Sand Beach. Afternoon spa or Imerovigli village.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Santorini Airport/Ferry.

name: Egypt Pyramids & Nile Cruise
overview: Walk with pharaohs — Great Pyramids, Nile River cruise, ancient temples of Luxor and Aswan.

itinerary.title: Arrival Cairo
itinerary.desc: Arrive Cairo. Evening Khan El Khalili Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Pyramids & Sphinx
itinerary.desc: Great Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Valley Temple. Afternoon Egyptian Museum. Evening Sound & Light show.

itinerary.title: Cairo to Aswan — Cruise
itinerary.desc: Fly to Aswan. Board Nile Cruise. Aswan High Dam, Philae Temple. Felucca sailing.

itinerary.title: Kom Ombo & Edfu
itinerary.desc: Cruise to Kom Ombo Temple, Edfu Temple of Horus. Continue to Luxor. Onboard entertainment.

itinerary.title: Luxor — Valley of Kings
itinerary.desc: Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, Colossi of Memnon. Afternoon Karnak & Luxor Temple.

itinerary.title: Luxor to Cairo
itinerary.desc: Disembark. Fly to Cairo. Free for shopping/Citadel. Farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Cairo Airport.

name: Mauritius Island Paradise
overview: Turquoise lagoons, white sand beaches, volcanic landscapes — perfect romantic island getaway.

itinerary.title: Arrival Mauritius
itinerary.desc: Arrive SSR Airport. Transfer to beach resort. Evening sunset at beach.

itinerary.title: North Island Tour
itinerary.desc: Port Louis, Caudan Waterfront, Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, Grand Baie shopping.

itinerary.title: South Island Tour
itinerary.desc: Trou aux Cerfs volcano, Chamarel Seven Coloured Earth, Black River Gorges, Le Morne Underwater Waterfall viewpoint.

itinerary.title: Ile aux Cerfs Catamaran
itinerary.desc: Full day catamaran cruise. Snorkeling, BBQ lunch on board, waterfalls by boat.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day
itinerary.desc: Beach, spa, kayaking, glass-bottom boat. Optional Casela Nature Park.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport.

name: Azerbaijan — Land of Fire
overview: Emerging destination — Baku's futuristic architecture, ancient old city, mud volcanoes, Gabala mountains.

itinerary.title: Arrival Baku
itinerary.desc: Arrive Baku. Evening Baku Boulevard and Flame Towers lit up at night.

itinerary.title: Baku City Tour
itinerary.desc: Old City UNESCO — Maiden Tower, Shirvanshahs Palace. Heydar Aliyev Center, Highland Park, Fountain Square.

itinerary.title: Absheron Peninsula
itinerary.desc: Yanar Dag burning mountain, Ateshgah Fire Temple, Bibi-Heybat Mosque. Gobustan mud volcanoes.

itinerary.title: Gabala Day Trip
itinerary.desc: Drive to Gabala (3 hrs). Tufandag Mountain Resort cable car, Nohur Lake. Return Baku.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport.

name: Bhutan — Last Shangri-La
overview: World's happiest country — Tiger's Nest, Punakha Dzong, pristine Himalayan landscapes.

itinerary.title: Arrival Paro
itinerary.desc: Arrive Paro (stunning approach). Transfer to Thimphu. Memorial Chorten, Handicraft Market.

itinerary.title: Thimphu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Buddha Dordenma, Tashichho Dzong, National Library, Folk Heritage Museum, Takin Preserve.

itinerary.title: Thimphu to Punakha
itinerary.desc: Drive via Dochula Pass (3,100m) with 108 Chortens. Punakha Dzong, Suspension Bridge, Chimi Lhakhang.

itinerary.title: Punakha to Paro
itinerary.desc: Drive to Paro. Rinpung Dzong, National Museum, Kyichu Lhakhang (oldest temple). Evening Paro town.

itinerary.title: Tiger's Nest Trek
itinerary.desc: Full day trek to Taktsang Monastery. 5-6 hr return trek through pine forests. Iconic sight.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Paro Airport.

name: Japan Tokyo, Kyoto & Osaka
overview: Ancient traditions meets futuristic technology — Tokyo neon, Kyoto temples, Osaka street food.

itinerary.title: Arrival Tokyo
itinerary.desc: Arrive Narita/Haneda. Evening Shibuya Crossing and Shinjuku.

itinerary.title: Tokyo City Tour
itinerary.desc: Senso-ji Temple, Tokyo Skytree, Imperial Palace, Akihabara. Evening Odaiba.

itinerary.title: Mt. Fuji Excursion
itinerary.desc: Day trip Mt. Fuji 5th Station. Hakone, Lake Ashi cruise, Owakudani volcanic valley.

itinerary.title: Tokyo to Kyoto — Shinkansen
itinerary.desc: Bullet train to Kyoto. Kinkaku-ji, Arashiyama Bamboo Grove, Togetsukyo Bridge.

itinerary.title: Kyoto Temples & Nara
itinerary.desc: Fushimi Inari, Kiyomizu-dera. Day trip Nara deer park, Todai-ji.

itinerary.title: Kyoto to Osaka
itinerary.desc: Train to Osaka. Osaka Castle, Dotonbori street food, Shinsaibashi shopping.

itinerary.title: Universal Studios Japan
itinerary.desc: Full day Universal Studios. Wizarding World of Harry Potter.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Kansai Airport.

name: Australia Sydney & Melbourne
overview: Sydney Opera House, Great Ocean Road, Blue Mountains, Melbourne culture.

itinerary.title: Arrival Sydney
itinerary.desc: Arrive Sydney. Evening Darling Harbour.

itinerary.title: Sydney City Tour
itinerary.desc: Opera House, Harbour Bridge, The Rocks, Botanic Gardens. Bondi Beach. Harbour cruise.

itinerary.title: Blue Mountains
itinerary.desc: Three Sisters, Scenic Railway, Echo Point. Featherdale Wildlife Park koala encounter.

itinerary.title: Sydney Free Day
itinerary.desc: Optional Taronga Zoo, Manly Beach, Queen Victoria Building shopping.

itinerary.title: Sydney to Melbourne
itinerary.desc: Fly to Melbourne. Federation Square, Flinders Street, laneways street art tour.

itinerary.title: Great Ocean Road
itinerary.desc: Full day — Twelve Apostles, Loch Ard Gorge, London Arch, Bells Beach.

itinerary.title: Phillip Island
itinerary.desc: Penguin Parade, Churchill Island Heritage Farm.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Melbourne Airport.
